response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of professional software development experience with a full-stack profile that maps closely to the role's requirements. He has hands-on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS CDK experience, backed by an exceptionally strong testing culture demonstrated through TDD workshops, open-source testing libraries, and consistent test-first delivery across multiple companies. His current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, which aligns precisely with the AI agent development requirement. The primary gaps are the absence of explicit NestJS and Kotlin experience and no visible Python background, but his demonstrated polyglot adaptability makes these low-risk deficiencies for an otherwise highly qualified senior candidate.
strengths: Active AI agent and MCP framework development at current role (re:cinq), directly satisfying the AI agent experience requirement
Exceptional testing culture: authored Fluent-Asserts and Trial open-source testing libraries, ran TDD/Selenium workshops, and applied TDD/CI/CD across multiple production environments
Broad polyglot full-stack experience (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Java, DLang, C++) with cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) spanning 15+ years
concerns: NestJS is absent from the resume despite being the primary backend framework in the stack, introducing onboarding overhead
Kotlin and Python are listed as required/preferred skills but do not appear anywhere in the resume or project history
React experience is visible at only one employer (Optilyz); frontend depth relative to the candidate's clear backend seniority is difficult to assess
